# openai_model_responses (Data Source)

Data source for listing OpenAI model responses



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `after` (String)
- `before` (String)
- `filter_by_user` (String)
- `limit` (Number)
- `order` (String)

### Read-Only

- `has_more` (Boolean)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `responses` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--responses))

<a id="nestedatt--responses"></a>
### Nested Schema for `responses`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (Number)
- `id` (String)
- `model` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `usage` (Map of String)
